description: Single-file Ruby project with one planted defect, hermetic run. e2e for the Ruby 3.4 variant (DHI ruby 3.4 base; same shared RM dist as qodana-ruby, differing only in QD_BASE_IMAGE). Proves qodana-ruby-3.4 builds (base + node + eslint + ruby + privileged + dist + cli + runtime), loads its EAP RubyMine profile, and scans a real .rb producing SARIF. Driver name + rule id are NEEDS-PINNING starting guesses — pin from a CI control run and confirm the id is enabled in THIS image's default RM (RubyMine) profile.

expectations.reason: STARTING-GUESS id: the planted `unused = value * 2` local that is assigned and never read must surface as an unused-local-variable inspection; pin the exact id from a CI control run and confirm it is in the EAP RubyMine profile.
